column_description: the unique identifier for the order

value_description:
yyyy-mm-dd
commonsense evidence: 'shipment time' refers to the time interval between order_date and ship_date.

column_description: the ship mode of the order
value_description:
First Class / Second Class / Standard Class
commonsense evidence: Among three ship modes, First Class has the fastest delivery speed, followed by Second Class and the speed of the Standard Class is the slowest.
commonsense evidence: original price = sales / (1- discount)

column_description: the profit that the company got by selling the product
value_description:
commonsense evidence: total cost of products =  sales / (1- discount) * quantity - profit
deficiency: if the value is negative
